rulings.Case Title: JOY ANDERSON VS. CITIAPARTMENTS, INC et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Order As Void Or In The Alternative To Withdraw Admissions By Defendant David Raynal
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, February 21, 2014, line 1. DEFENDANT RAYNAL, DAVID's Motion To Set Aside Order As Void Or In The Alternative To Withdraw Admissions By Defendant David Raynal GRANTED - Defendant satisfies requirements of Code of Civil Procedure § 2033.300.= (501/JAR)

rulings.Case Title: ROBERT M DUNCAN et al VS. JIN REIN WANG et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant'S Notice Of Motion For Order Determining Good Faith Settlement
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, February 21, 2014, line 2. Defendant'S Motion For Order Determining Good Faith Settlement GRANTED.= (501/JAR)

rulings.Case Title: HANS REINHARDT VS. PRANA EIGHT PROPERTIES LLC et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, February 21, 2014, line 3. DEFENDANT PRANA EIGHT PROPERTIES LLC's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT SUSTAINED. Declaration of Patel establishes no receipt of motion and supporting papers at Applicant's premises. Accordingly, the Motion for Summary Judgment by Prana is off calendar without prejudice to refilling.= (501/JAR)

rulings.Case Title: HANS REINHARDT VS. PRANA EIGHT PROPERTIES LLC et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT (Ccp 437c; Crc Rule 3:1350)
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, February 21, 2014, line 3. PLAINTIFF HANS REINHARDT's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT (Ccp 437c; Crc Rule 3:1350) DENIED - there is a triable issue of fact as to whether bedbugs were transmitted to Reinhardt's room by vacuum cleaners. = (501/JAR)

rulings.Case Title: ELIZABETH MARIE BARNSON KARNAZES VS. ISERVE et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, February 21, 2014, line 6. DEFENDANT CITIMORTGAGE, INC. ERRONEOUSLY SUED AS, CITIBANK, N.A.'s DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT CONTINUED to March 7, 2014, because the opposition was not properly filed and no courtesy copy was provided. Karnazes must file her opposition with the Court and provide a courtesy copy by Tuesday, February 25, 2014. = (501/JAR)

rulings.Case Title: THOMAS MURRAY JR. VS. ANOUSHIRAVAN MASSOUMI et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Def/X-Complainant Massoumi'S Further Responses To Set Two Of Pltf Murray'S Request For Production Of Documents Nos 14-26 And Rquest For Monetary Sanctions Against Def/X-Complainant Massoumi For $1297.50
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, February 21, 2014, line 7. PLAINTIFF THOMAS MURRAY's Motion To Compel Defendant/Cross-Complainant Massoumi'S Further Responses To Set Two Of Plaintiff Murray'S Request For Production Of Documents Nos 14-26 And Rquest For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant/Cross-Complainant Massoumi For $1297.50 GRANTED. Plaintiff establishes that documents sought are relevant or may lead to discovery of admissible evidence. Motion for Sanctions is DENIED - the Court finds it would be unjust to sanction Defendant Massoumi for redacting information on other properties. = (501/JAR)

rulings.Case Title: FARHAD ZAGHI VS. CECELIA KENNEDY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Cross Defendant Plm Loan Management Services, Inc'S Demurrer To 1st Amended Cross Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, February 21, 2014, line 8. Cross Defendant Plm Loan Management Services, Inc'S Demurrer To 1st Amended Cross Complaint OVERRULED. Knowledge or constructive knowledge alleged to be held by PLM sufficient to allege wrongful foreclosure. = (501/JAR)(late tentative)

rulings.Case Title: FARHAD ZAGHI VS. CECELIA KENNEDY et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, February 21, 2014, line 8. CROSS DEFENDANT FARHAD ZAGHI's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT OVERRULED. Identity theft under Civil Code § 1798.93 is applicable to this situation. Knowledge or constructive knowledge alleged to be held by Zaghi sufficient to allege wrongful foreclosure. = (501/JAR)

rulings.Case Title: BARNABA BIENKOWSKI et al VS. LAWRENCE CHOY et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, February 21, 2014, line 9. DEFENDANT CHRISTINA SUTTON's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT SUSTAINED with leave to amend.
